'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=6x0aItC9JUFKsetLo9O.IXfXtV2p8GiJ92i_Wxb2uxg-1774683826-1.0.1.1-a0BvkB5OfA8W0wug6XAWuYYm6ARZWIDI38DaY1QhZrI"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
